docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALEMAN, CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT GALCHENKO, IGOR DBA ACCURATE TOUCH, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
